character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician involved in deciphering a treasure map and planning a voyage to locate buried treasure.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A hot-headed individual eager to embark on a treasure hunt and organize a ship for the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A participant in the treasure hunt, mentioned as someone who may agree to join the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: A cabin-boy to be taken along on the voyage, as mentioned by the squire.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: A gamekeeper who oversees Jim and is described as a poor reader.

character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A one-legged cook who joins the crew, described as having lost his leg in service under Hawke.
